normal_ci.reason: The weakened head test only checks that the total is positive.

control_failure.reason: The original assertion proves the 10 percent discount should produce 9000 cents.

risk_ids.mapping: The scenario requires the oracle stage to inspect test-control changes, including skip/xfail/todo additions, even though this specific PR weakens rather than skips the test.
The exact discounted-total assertion is replaced with a weaker assertion.
The new test only checks a broad positive value and would miss the wrong total.
The PR edits code and tests together, making green CI unreliable without an oracle-integrity stage.
The scenario becomes a reusable adversarial regression corpus entry.
